H100_x2.description: 2x H100 80GB PCIe. Required for local VLM inference per docs/vlm.md.

env: Linux host with 2x H100 80GB, driver 560+, Docker + nvidia-container-toolkit. RAG stack is running. VLM configuration is controlled via APP_VLM_MODELNAME and APP_VLM_SERVERURL in the deployment config. See docs/vlm.md for supported VLM configurations. cwd: ${RAG_REPO_ROOT}/.

expects.query: Use the rag-enable-vlm skill to enable image plus text querying for RAG. Configure the VLM endpoint, restart affected services, and verify multimodal queries work. The eval runs from inside the repository checkout; use git rev-parse --show-toplevel if you need the absolute path.
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-enable-vlm SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it checked the hardware support matrix before enabling VLM
The agent's trajectory shows it configured the VLM endpoint in the deployment config
The agent's trajectory shows it restarted affected RAG services after the config change

expects.query: I have PDFs with diagrams and charts. I want to be able to search the visual content in my documents, not just the text.
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-enable-vlm SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it referenced the VLM embeddings documentation
The agent's final response explains how to configure VLM embeddings for visual content retrieval
The agent's final response provides steps for enabling image-aware ingestion
